reason: Node 1.6.3 declares no dependencies, but it logically depends on Node 1.6.1 (matrix algebra setup: A = M_n(C), states = density matrices, phi_rho(a) = Tr(rho a)) and Node 1.6.2 (M_n(C) has a unique irreducible representation, namely id : M_n(C) -> B(C^n), so every *-representation decomposes as id^{+r}). Without these, the claims in 1.6.3 are not self-contained. Dependencies on 1.6.1 and 1.6.2 should be added.
